since_last: 64% of 89 AI names green; AI Platforms, Internet & AdTech leads +5.16%; AI bubble risk 49 Neutral.

cards.headline: The tape: a broad bid, 64% of AI names green
cards.body: SPX +0.02% · BTC +2.57% · Gold +1.51% · Nasdaq100 -1.24%. 64% of 89 AI names are green — a broad bid. AI Platforms, Internet & AdTech is doing the heavy lifting at +5.16%.

cards.headline: AI Platforms, Internet & AdTech leads, Chip Equipment & AI Hardware lags
cards.body: Strongest AI sector is AI Platforms, Internet & AdTech at +5.16%; weakest is Chip Equipment & AI Hardware at -4.53%. Rotation within the AI trade, not a one-way move.

cards.headline: KLAC is the standout at -12.45%
cards.body: Leaders: APP +10.93%, META +10.30%, CRWD +9.97%, PLTR +9.63%, PATH +8.09%. Laggards: KLAC -12.45%, LRCX -11.24%, AMAT -11.18%, TER -11.02%.
cards.watch: Hot means attention, not direction — watch whether the leaders hold the bid or fade into the next session.

cards.headline: SpaceX (SPCX) -6.95% at $158.98
cards.body: The SpaceX debut keeps pulling attention — SPCX is -6.95% this session. The biggest IPO in history remains the tape's attention magnet.

cards.headline: Risk: AI bubble index 49 — Neutral
cards.body: The composite AI Bubble Index sits at 49/100, led by Valuation at 85. Higher = frothier; the risk is everyone caring at once while valuations are already stretched.
